feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Transfer standard field from erp delivery to ewm delivery
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement to transfer the Unloading Point (ABLAD) from ERP to EWM for outbound deliveries.

  • Source: RESB-ABLAD
  • In ERP delivery, the field is available at header level (LIKP-ABLAD), but not found at item level (LIPS)
  • Requirement: make this information available per item in EWM
  • working on s/4 Hana 2023

Current approach:

  • Extension via EEW (item level)
  • Mapping via BAdI /SCWM/EX_ERP_MAPIN_OD_SAVEREPL (MAPIN)

Questions:

  • Is this the correct BAdI for this scenario in embedded EWM?
  • How would you handle the mapping per item, given that ABLAD is not available in LIPS?
  • Do we need an ERP enhancement to pass it at item level?

thanks for support

entry.title: using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE to perform a 102 reversal
entry.content: When using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE to perform a 102 reversal, the input parameters REF_DOC_YR, REF_DOC, and REF_DOC_IT are provided in BAPI2017_GM_ITEM_CREATE. However, in the generated material document, the fields SJAHR, SMBLN, and SMBLP are blank when checked in MSEG Question: Besides providing the values for REF_DOC_YR, REF_DOC, and REF_DOC_IT in GOODSMVT_ITEM, which additional field in GOODSMVT_ITEM must be filled so that SJAHR, SMBLN, and SMBLP can also be generated?

entry.title: neuer Bewertungsbereich für Versicherungswerte
entry.content:
Guten Tag, können Sie mir bitte helfen zu verstehen, wie der neue Bewertungsbereich für Versicherungswerte angelegt werden muss?

Ich habe jetzt mit allen hier zur Verfügung stehenden Informationen einen Bewertungsbereich erstellt. Dieser bringt den Fehler E006 obwohl ich einen Anlage ohne Wert habe.

Zudem ist mir unklar, wie ich die Versicherungswerte dann von 'migriere' in den neuen Bereich hinein?

Ebenfalls würde ich gerne den Index je Anlagenklasse vorgeben aber das Feld in Transaktion OAYZ ist ausgegraut. 

Gibt es irgendwo eine vernünftige Anleitung?

Vielen Dank im Voraus

S. Horsch

entry.title: im ERM wird die EKG in den Banf-Belegen nicht richtig angezeigt
entry.content:
In der Übersicht unter Banfen gesamt wird bzw. sollte in der Detailsicht in der Spalte EkGrpBeleg die Einkäufergruppe, die in der Banf eingetragen ist angezeigt. Es gibt aber Einträge, bei denen die Einkäufergruppe nicht richtig aus den Belegen ausgelesen wird.

Siehe Word-Anhang

entry.title: Correction of header data without changing item details for Poland credit memo
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a standard credit‑memo document type in Poland that permits corrections to header‑level data without altering the line‑item details, specifically for the purpose of addressing formal errors?

This clarification is required for our Poland implementation ticket, as we need to ensure compliance with local legal and accounting requirements while avoiding unnecessary changes to item‑level data.

Thank you in advance for your support.

Regards,
Yoshinee Mootheeveeren

entry.title: unable to locate the path where billing plan type 03 is mainained from the attched screen
entry.content:
unable  to locate the path where billing plan type 03 is maintained from  the attached screen .

Kindly share the path 

i was unable to find in below 2 paths

IMG > Sales and Distribution > Billing > Payment Cards > Maintain Payment Card Plan Types.

IMG > Sales and Distribution > Billing > Billing plan  > Define billing plan .

entry.title: Howdo we handle Q stock posting through QM management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like SAP’s guidance on how to manage the following business scenario in S/4HANA.

We are required to implement a rolling quarantine process.

The business requirement is to Keep materials under Quality Management control, Prevent any SD customer delivery until a final Usage Decision (UD) is taken, While still allowing certain logistics movements (internal or third-party stock transfers)  before the end of the QM process. 

In an ECC6 environment, the Q stock status represents a strong logistical lock, preventing any use or transfer of the stock until quality release is completed.

The purpose is to analyze the possibilities offered by S/4HANA QM standard or controlled Q’ process designs” to address a specific business requirement (strong business constraints (ultra-fresh products, very short expiration dates, and high operational impact), , while maintaining strict quality governance.

Business Requirement Description<

entry.title: Flexible workflow for sales documents multiple currencies
entry.content:
Hello!

How is it possible to have multi-currencies in the Flexible workflow for Sales Credit notes?

For example: We have a credit note order with currency in JPY but the workflow rule is set up in EUR.

Should it be done as code in a BAPI? If so, please explain. Something similar of 2990437 - Flexible workflow: Incorrect currency conversion of item value in purchase requisition during the approval - SAP for Me 

Kind Regards,

Leonardo Delgado

entry.title: SAP SD Consultant role (OTC, S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hello,
I am currently working in SAP SD as a Master Data specialist (customer data, pricing conditions, etc.), and I would like to transition into a functional SAP SD Consultant role (OTC, S/4HANA).

What practical skills am I still missing to be project-ready (customizing, pricing, FI/MM integration, debugging, etc.)?

Also, do you have any concrete advice or hands-on scenarios I could practice to make this transition more efficiently?

entry.title: Odoo vs SAP: Strategic Overlap or Different Leagues?
entry.content:
I’m interested in understanding how the community strategically positions Odoo within the broader ERP landscape dominated by players like SAP.

 

Rather than a feature-level comparison, I’m looking at this from a market and transformation perspective:

 

  • Do you see Odoo as an emerging competitive threat to SAP in specific segments, or primarily as a complementary solution addressing a different tier of customers?
  • How should we think about the distinction between “enterprise-grade depth” versus “modular agility” when comparing the two platforms?
  • In digital transformation initiatives, under what conditions would Odoo be strategically preferred over SAP, if at all?
  • Do you foresee convergence over time, where platforms like Odoo begin to challenge SAP in larger, more complex enterprise environments?

 

Appreciate insights grounded in real implementations, especially from those who have evaluated or worked across both ecosystems

entry.title: Subtotal on manage sales orders 2 (F3893)
entry.content:
Hi 

does anyone know how to have a subtotal (Order type in my example) in a Manage sales order V.2 ? 

It's very strange this possibility is missing 

 

tks

entry.title: TO print checkbox, need to be turned off for SLOC-Level is WM
entry.content: Want to know how to configure TO print checkbox, need to be turned off for SLOC-level is WM

entry.title: Advanced MD04 - Customizing Monitor /SAPLOM/MDA_C / Component XX-PROJ-CON-MDA
entry.content:
Transaction /SAPLOM/MD04 (advanced MD04)

I am not able to add the storage location (LGORT) in settings tab as it is displayed in following documentation:  

Storage location stocks in pages 15 and 16  MD4_EN.pdf 

I am wondering if customizing monitor /SAPLOM/MDA_C will be the solution to activate the storage location.

entry.title: App or tool for massive upload condititons material inclusion/exclusion
entry.content:
Hi All,

We need to do massive upload for conditions of material inclusion/exclusion.

Could you please inform us if there is an app or tool for this upload?

With MASS tcode can we upload?

 

Best regards,

Roberto Teodozio

entry.title: Advanced MD04 - Customizing Monitor /SAPLOM/MDA_C / Component XX-PROJ-CON-MDA
entry.content:
Transaction /SAPLOM/MD04 (advanced MD04)

I am not able to add the storage location (LGORT) in settings tab as it is displayed in following documentation:  

Storage location stocks in pages 15 and 16  MD4_EN.pdf 

I am wondering if customizing monitor /SAPLOM/MDA_C will be the solution to activate the storage location.

entry.title: Error AAPO105
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, we have an issue related to the error AAPO105, in our case the Asset that we are trying to perform a clearing through out transaction AIAB, is resulting in error AAPO105, because the original asset that is an AUC asset, doesn't have the valuation area 12, and the new asset that is receiving the values, have the valuation area 12.

I don't know if we can enable the area 12 only to one asset that would be AUC asset. If we execute the program AFBN is for all the assets that are in the valuation plan. 

I don't know if there maybe exists a program that can enable to only one asset a missing valuation area. 

 

Thanks!

Angela.

entry.title: Issue in Business Process regarding BP
entry.content: While doing F-47 & ME21N, the system is not allowing BP number, but it is allowing the Vendor number.

entry.title: 需要一套架构和生产系统一样的空系统，作为生产系统的备用系统。
entry.content:
需要搭建一套和运行中的ERP生产系统架构一样的备用系统，备用系统为空系统，使用新安装的方式，不使用system copy的方式，请指导搭建工作。总共4台rhel7.6服务器，其中两台数据库服务器运行oracle 19c rac，另外两台应用服务器app1和app2上运行pacemaker+corosync集群，其中app1上运行ascs+ci服务，app2上运行ers+di服务。

 

1.提供初步搭建步骤。

2.提供详细安装手册。

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DMS - open workstation application type HTM from windows 11
entry.content:
Hello

When I open DMS HTM workstation application with win 10 the link opened.when I try to open from windows11the same HTM link, I get an error. As recommended I try to change in DC30 the HTM (workstation application) -> define workstation application in network from %AUTH% to: blank -empty, cmd.exe /c start  %1 

cmd.exe /c start "" %1

cmd.exe /c start  "%1"

None of them were able to open the link in win 11.

what can I do to open the link (HTM workstation application) from win11.

best regard,

Michal

entry.title: Solution Manager rises an MAXDB Log fill level error
entry.content:
Hello all, 

this might be a bit of a specific Error, however i wasn't able to find a true solution so i want to ask here. 

We get Alerts from our Solution manager at random times from two Content Server Databases with the following text:

Activated (Log fill level > 1.5 * Log segment size)

I am not really sure what that actually means and even more importantly, how to solve the issue. We do not seem to have any issues that the log runs full, or the System is not able to write down logs. So asking the AI, it states that the log Segment size would need to be increased. That however would mean i would need to recrate the DB as Log Segments cannot easily be recreated as Disk Segments. 

Has anyone encountered this?

Thank you very much!

Alessandro Büch
